chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.S-87 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 21-7-2025 Mr. Noor Muhammad Soomro, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not wish to press the instant petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Naveed Ali
